svg.title: Active defense architecture with perimeter firewall
svg.desc: A perimeter firewall does coarse IP/port filtering before traffic reaches ingestion. Traffic then splits into three lanes: NSM fast path to XDP enforcement, ClamAV content scanning to quarantine, and spectral engine to anomaly scoring. All three converge on a correlation engine, which triggers containment. Containment feeds back into anomaly scoring, and confirmed-malicious IPs from XDP enforcement sync back up to the firewall as coarse upstream rules.
